Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Enum Class ConnectedAppOauthAccessScope

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ConnectedAppOauthAccessScope>
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ConnectedAppOauthAccessScope
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ConnectedAppOauthAccessScope>, Constable
public enum ConnectedAppOauthAccessScope extends Enum<ConnectedAppOauthAccessScope>
